title: Thinair Soul Rebalance
description: Fixes for Thinair to make it more BALANCED
body:
# Thinair Soul Rebalance
While the **Thinair mod** is amazing for _soft progression_ in modpacks, the creators of it limit the things you can actually configure :(

In this datapack it simply makes soul torches more harder to obtain so that the clever players of YOUR smp don't ruin progression by spam crafting these Infinite Air Sticks!!!

## Changes:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Minecraft Soul Recipe Amplified
- Create Haunting Recipe Removed
- Thinair Air Devices Recipes Improved

</details>

Featured in these modpacks :)
- Celeste Create Hell

If you need any help or suggestions, join the discord!
